title: Justicia notha
taxonomy: Justicia notha is a species within the family Acanthaceae. It belongs to the genus Justicia, which comprises approximately 500 species of flowering plants. The family Acanthaceae is a group of flowering plants that are commonly known as the acanthus or acanthus family. This family is part of the larger group of plants known as angiosperms, which include flowering plants that produce seeds in fruits or flowers. The classification of Justicia notha provides important information about its evolutionary relationships and biological characteristics.
